hero.title: Velesari Holdings
hero.subtitle: Private trading house allocating proprietary capital in Energy and Agriculture.
hero.body: Velesari Holdings underwrites commodity-linked exposure where inventory behavior, transport capacity, seasonal supply, and counterparty obligations can be tested before capital is committed.
hero.inBrief: Primary focus: energy systems and agricultural supply chains. Secondary review covers metals, logistics, infrastructure, and operating partnerships when they affect physical flow or execution quality.

domains.title: Primary concentration with selective secondary coverage
domains.intro: The firm concentrates on markets with observable physical constraints, documented delivery pathways, and risk boundaries that can be defined before deployment.

items.title: Energy (Primary)
items.body: Coverage across power, fuel, and transport-linked systems where storage use, regional constraints, and delivery routes influence price behavior.

items.title: Agriculture (Primary)
items.body: Coverage across agricultural supply chains where weather, crop cycles, processing throughput, export timing, and freight capacity shape imbalance risk.

items.title: Secondary Sectors
items.body: Selective review of metals, logistics, infrastructure, and operating partnerships when they change commodity movement, access, or settlement reliability.

revenue.title: Capital deployment channels
revenue.intro: Capital is deployed only where position terms, operating responsibilities, and control limits are defined in advance.

pillars.title: Commodity-linked positions
pillars.body: Exposure to commodity-linked dislocations supported by documented structure signals and pre-defined loss limits.

pillars.title: Strategic ownership
pillars.body: Longer-horizon ownership in assets or businesses tied to recurring commodity throughput, access, or service capacity.

pillars.title: Operating partnerships
pillars.body: Selective operating relationships where documentation, control rights, commercial alignment, and execution roles are verifiable.

method.title: Structured process from thesis to review
method.intro: Every commitment follows the same sequence: structure assessment, downside definition, counterparty review, execution control, and portfolio supervision.

steps.title: Structure Assessment
steps.body: Each thesis starts with supply-demand balance, inventory behavior, transport limits, and delivery optionality.

steps.title: Risk Definition
steps.body: Position size, scenario range, concentration, and invalidation levels are set before execution.

steps.title: Portfolio Supervision
steps.body: Open exposure is monitored against assumptions and adjusted when evidence changes.

principles.title: Controls that shape allocation behavior
principles.intro: Controls define how the firm sizes risk, approves commercial relationships, documents terms, and reviews open exposure.

items.title: Counterparty Review
items.body: Legal terms, operating readiness, and settlement reliability are screened before commitment.

items.title: Risk Limits
items.body: Capital-at-risk thresholds and concentration boundaries are established ahead of execution.

items.title: Documentation First
items.body: Commercial terms, responsibilities, and review triggers are codified to reduce ambiguity during execution.

items.title: Review Cadence
items.body: Positions are reassessed on a defined cadence and when market evidence moves outside the original thesis.

nameMeaning.title: Privately funded. Privately held.
nameMeaning.body: The capital base is internal, allowing allocation decisions to follow market evidence, risk limits, and operating diligence rather than external fundraising timelines.

proof.title: Route by objective
proof.intro: The site separates mandate, market focus, governance, and correspondence so institutional visitors can reach the right context quickly.

items.title: About
items.body: Firm identity, proprietary capital mandate, ownership posture, and leadership accountability.

items.title: Strategy and Markets
items.body: Decision sequence and sector coverage with the physical constraints that matter most in each focus area.

items.title: Governance and Contact
items.body: Interpretive boundaries, legal notices, and direct channels for General inquiries, Partnerships, and Legal & Compliance matters.

cta.title: Start with the correct inquiry channel
cta.body: Use dedicated pathways for General inquiries, Partnerships, and Legal & Compliance notices.
